name: agent-chat
description: Multi-agent collaboration for Codex via filesystem-mediated turn-taking. N agents on an arbitrary graph (Petersen, ring, star, pair) write turns to per-edge CONVO.md files with atomic .turn sentinels. Lossless DAG-based archive layer keeps long conversations cheap to re-read. Round-15b: Codex-side plugin manifest. The wire protocol is identical to the Claude Code variant — agents in different runtimes can collaborate on the same graph. NOTE: hook event taxonomy + slash-command registration require empirical Codex probe (see docs/round-15b-codex-probe.md).
